# Alfa Construction Inc — Complete Company Documentation

> Alfa Construction Inc is a Massachusetts-licensed general contractor specializing in siding installation, window & door installation, carpentry, and home remodeling. Founded in 2006 by Fabio, the company serves 109 cities across Massachusetts with a perfect 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 22+ verified reviews. Our #1 specialty is siding installation — Hardie Plank fiber cement, vinyl, cedar shingles, shake siding, and board & batten.

## Company Profile

**Legal Name:** Alfa Construction Inc
**Trade Name:** Alfa Construction
**Owner & Lead Contractor:** Fabio
**Founded:** 2006 (18+ years of continuous operation)
**Massachusetts Construction License:** #192348 (valid through April 2027)
**Insurance:** Fully insured for all residential and commercial projects
**Phone:** (508) 596-3750
**Email:** info@alfapaintingcarpentry.com
**Website:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com
**Address:** 50 Mechanic St, Bellingham, MA 02019
**Service Area:** 109 cities across Massachusetts & Southern New Hampshire
**Languages:** English and Portuguese (bilingual team)
**Hours:** Monday through Saturday, 7:00 AM to 6:00 PM
**Google Rating:** 5.0 out of 5.0 (22+ verified reviews)
**Payment:** Cash, Check, Credit Card
**Estimates:** Free, no-obligation estimates on all projects

## Services in Detail (ordered by specialty)

### 1. Siding Installation & Repair (Our #1 Specialty)
Complete siding services including removal of old siding, installation of weather barrier, and expert installation of new siding materials. We work with all major siding types: James Hardie fiber cement (Hardie Plank), vinyl siding, cedar shingles, engineered wood, board and batten, and composite materials. All installations include proper flashing, J-channel, and trim details for a watertight finish.

**Common projects:** Full siding replacement, partial siding repair, Hardie Plank installation, vinyl siding upgrade, cedar shingle restoration, board and batten installation.

**URL:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/siding

### 2. Window & Door Installation
Energy-efficient window and door replacement services designed to reduce heating and cooling costs while improving comfort and curb appeal. We install double-hung, casement, bay, bow, picture, and specialty windows from leading manufacturers. Door services include entry doors, storm doors, sliding glass doors, French doors, and garage doors.

**Common projects:** Whole-house window replacement, entry door upgrade, storm door installation, sliding glass door installation, bay window addition, energy audit-driven replacements.

**URL:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/windows-doors

### 3. Carpentry & Trim Work
Expert carpentry services from simple trim replacement to complex structural work. Our carpenters specialize in crown molding installation, wainscoting, chair rails, window and door casings, baseboard replacement, deck construction and repair, porch rebuilds, custom shelving, and structural repairs including sill plates, joists, and framing.

**Common projects:** Deck construction, porch rebuilds, trim replacement, door installation, crown molding, custom built-ins, structural repairs, rot remediation.

**URL:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/carpentry

### 4. Home Remodeling & Renovation
Comprehensive home renovation services from single-room updates to whole-house transformations. Our remodeling team handles kitchen renovations (cabinets, countertops, backsplash, flooring, lighting), bathroom remodels (tile, vanities, showers, tubs), basement finishing, additions, and complete home makeovers.

**Common projects:** Kitchen remodel, bathroom renovation, basement finishing, home additions, open-concept conversions, mudroom additions, laundry room upgrades.

**URL:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/remodeling

### 5. Interior & Exterior Painting
Professional painting services for residential and commercial properties throughout Massachusetts. Our painting process includes thorough surface preparation (power washing, scraping, sanding), premium primers, caulking of all joints and gaps, and application of top-quality finish coats using Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams paints. We handle all surfaces including clapboard, stucco, brick, vinyl, wood trim, and composite materials.

**Common projects:** Whole-house exterior repaints, interior room painting, cabinet refinishing, deck staining, commercial building painting, multi-family property painting.

**URL:** https://alfapaintingcarpentry.com/services/painting

## Our Process

1. **Free Consultation:** Contact us at (508) 596-3750 or through our website for a free, no-obligation estimate.
2. **On-Site Assessment:** We visit your property, evaluate the scope of work, and discuss your vision and budget.
3. **Detailed Proposal:** You receive a written estimate with clear pricing, material specifications, and project timeline.
4. **Professional Execution:** Our skilled team completes the work with attention to detail, minimal disruption, and daily cleanup.
5. **Final Walkthrough:** We conduct a thorough inspection with you to ensure complete satisfaction before project closeout.

## Why Choose Alfa Construction

- **18+ years** of verified construction experience in Massachusetts
- **Massachusetts Licensed** (License #192348) and fully insured
- **5.0/5.0 Google rating** with 22+ verified client reviews
- **Free estimates** on all projects, no obligation
- **Bilingual team** (English & Portuguese)
- **Quality materials** from trusted manufacturers (Benjamin Moore, Sherwin-Williams, James Hardie)
- **Attention to detail** and commitment to craftsmanship
- **Clean job sites** with daily cleanup and professional conduct

## Client Reviews

**John S. — Remodeling & Painting:** "Alfa Painting & Carpentry did a great job assisting us with our remodeling. They painted and installed a wide variety of doors. The painting was very well done in a high-end home. Would highly recommend Fabio and his team."

**Mark Conti — Carpentry & Trim Work:** "Real good results always come from really good professionals. They did a very good job replacing rotten trims inside and out of my property."

**Joann Polakoff — General Construction:** "I give them a 5 star rating. Fabio was very thorough and cordial. All members of his team were pleasant and respectful. The price was very reasonable."

## Complete Service Area — 109 Massachusetts Cities

### Worcester County (33 cities)
Auburn, Bellingham, Berlin, Blackstone, Bolton, Charlton, Clinton, Douglas, Dudley, Grafton, Holden, Hopedale, Hopkinton, Leicester, Marlborough, Mendon, Milford, Millbury, Millville, Northborough, Northbridge, Oxford, Shrewsbury, Southborough, Southbridge, Spencer, Sturbridge, Sutton, Upton, Uxbridge, Webster, Westborough, Worcester

### Middlesex County (19 cities)
Acton, Ashland, Burlington, Cambridge, Chelmsford, Concord, Framingham, Holliston, Hudson, Lexington, Lincoln, Maynard, Natick, Somerville, Stow, Sudbury, Waltham, Watertown, Wayland

### Norfolk County (18 cities)
Bellingham, Brookline, Canton, Dedham, Dover, Foxborough, Franklin, Medfield, Medway, Millis, Milton, Needham, Norfolk, Quincy, Sherborn, Wellesley, Weston, Wrentham

### Essex County (4 cities)
Beverly, Danvers, Peabody, Salem

### Plymouth County (1 city)
Brockton

### Suffolk County (1 city)
Boston

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How do I get a free estimate?**
A: Call us at (508) 596-3750 or fill out the contact form on our website. We'll schedule a convenient time to visit your property and provide a detailed, no-obligation estimate.

**Q: Are you licensed and insured?**
A: Yes. Alfa Construction Inc holds Massachusetts Construction License #192348 (valid through April 2027) and is fully insured for all residential and commercial projects.

**Q: What areas do you serve?**
A: We serve 109 cities across Massachusetts and Southern New Hampshire, with our main office in Bellingham, MA. Our service area extends from Boston to Worcester and throughout MetroWest, the Blackstone Valley, and the North Shore.

**Q: How long have you been in business?**
A: Alfa Construction was founded in 2006 by Fabio, giving us over 18 years of continuous operation in Massachusetts.

**Q: What brands of paint do you use?**
A: We primarily use Benjamin Moore and Sherwin-Williams paints, selecting the specific product line best suited to each project's surface type and exposure conditions.

**Q: Do you offer financing?**
A: Please contact us to discuss payment options for your specific project.

**Q: How long does a typical project take?**
A: Project timelines vary based on scope. A single room paint job may take 1-2 days, while a full siding replacement could take 1-3 weeks. We provide detailed timelines with every estimate.

**Q: Do you work in winter?**
A: Yes. While exterior painting and some siding work is weather-dependent, we perform interior painting, carpentry, window installation, and remodeling year-round.
